title: Microsoft’s GitHub Changes AI Prices Again in Shift to Consumption-Based Fees
summary: Microsoft-owned GitHub on Monday said it would charge customers of its Copilot AI coding tools additional fees based on how much AI they use, on top of base subscription fees. The move resembles an industry shift from seat-based or subscription pricing for AI tools to so-called consumption-based ...

title: 600 Google Employees Ask Sundar Pichai to Reject Pentagon Classified AI Deal
summary: More than 600 Google employees signed a letter to Google CEO Sundar Pichai asking him to reject a proposed deal with the Department of Defense to use Google’s AI on classified work. “We want to see AI benefit humanity; not to see it being used in inhumane or extremely harmful ways,” employees ...

title: Altman, Brockman Attend Jury Selection in Musk vs. OpenAI Trial
summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and President Greg Brockman attended jury selection on Monday as the trial in Elon Musk’s lawsuit against them and OpenAI got underway. Both are expected to testify in the trial, but busy tech leaders tend to prefer to minimize the time they have to spend in court. ...
